title: Feature Catalog
tagline: Every capability of the multi-model data engine that powers Fabric DB.

categories.name: Multi-Model Data
categories.blurb: One engine, every shape of data — no glue between databases.

products.name: Document Model
products.description: Schemaless or schemafull document storage with deeply nested objects and arrays — no ORM impedance.
products.connects: Maps directly to Fabric's Thing/Asset records.

products.name: Graph Model
products.description: First-class record links and graph edges traversed in-query — the Relationship primitive, natively.
products.connects: Materializes the Relationship primitive without a second store.

products.name: Relational Tables
products.description: Define tables with typed fields, assertions, and defaults — relational rigor when you want it.
products.connects: Backs the generated SQL data models.

products.name: Vector & Embeddings
products.description: Native vector fields with HNSW/MTREE indexes for similarity search alongside your data.
products.connects: Powers Semantic Search on cataloged assets.

products.name: Geospatial
products.description: Native GeoJSON types and spatial functions for proximity and containment.
products.connects: Grounds the Location primitive and residency boundaries.

categories.name: Query & Compute
categories.blurb: SurrealQL — one language for documents, graphs, and vectors.

products.name: SurrealQL
products.tagline: A SQL-like language for every model.
products.description: Query documents, graphs, and vectors in one expressive, familiar language.
products.connects: The query surface for the whole fabric.

products.name: Functions
products.description: Hundreds of built-in functions plus DEFINE FUNCTION for reusable server-side logic.
products.connects: Implements Constraint expressions in-engine.

products.name: Full-Text Search
products.tagline: Search text without a second system.
products.description: Built-in full-text indexing with analyzers, scoring, and highlighting.
products.connects: Part of the Activate plane — no external search engine.

products.name: Computed Fields & Futures
products.description: Define fields whose values are computed at query time from other data.
products.connects: Keeps derived State consistent.

categories.name: Real-time & Sync
categories.blurb: Live data that pushes to clients and services.

products.name: Live Queries (Data Sync)
products.tagline: Subscribe to changes in real time.
products.description: LIVE SELECT pushes inserts, updates, and deletes to subscribers the instant they happen — data sync without polling.
products.connects: Streams Event changes to downstream modules.

products.name: Change Feeds (CDC)
products.tagline: An ordered log of every change.
products.description: Change data capture so you can replay, sync, or audit the full history of a table.
products.connects: Feeds the immutable Event audit trail.

products.name: Events & Triggers
products.description: DEFINE EVENT runs logic when records change — enforce policy and emit audit events.
products.connects: Enforces Policy and emits Events automatically.

categories.name: Security & Governance
categories.blurb: Governance built into the engine, not bolted on.

products.name: Row-Level Permissions
products.description: PERMISSIONS clauses enforce row-level security in the database, evaluated per query.
products.connects: Where Policy/Constraint become enforcement.

products.name: Authentication
products.description: Native authentication with record users, scopes, and JWT — no separate auth service required.
products.connects: Resolves the Identity primitive at the data layer.

products.name: Multi-Tenancy
products.description: Hierarchical namespaces and databases give clean tenant isolation in one cluster.
products.connects: Isolates each customer's fabric.

products.name: Schemafull / Schemaless
products.description: Choose SCHEMAFULL for governed tables and SCHEMALESS for fast iteration — per table.
products.connects: Enforces the generated primitive schemas.

products.name: Embedded Engine
products.description: Embed SurrealDB in your app (in-memory or on-disk) for edge and local-first use.
products.connects: Lets Fabric DB run anywhere.

products.name: Distributed Cluster
products.tagline: Scale out on a KV backend.
products.description: Run distributed on TiKV/FoundationDB for horizontal scale and high availability — the cloud-native path.
products.connects: The CNCF-aligned production deployment.

products.name: ACID Transactions
products.description: Full ACID transactions across documents and graph edges.
products.connects: Guarantees governed writes are atomic.

products.name: Managed Cloud
products.description: A managed, hosted deployment with backups, scaling, and monitoring — the DBaaS offering.
products.connects: How Fabric DB ships as a service.

products.name: SDKs
products.description: Official SDKs for Rust, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, .NET, Java, and PHP.
products.connects: Pairs with the generated primitive models.

products.name: HTTP, RPC & GraphQL
products.description: Query over HTTP REST, WebSocket RPC, or GraphQL out of the box.
products.connects: Exposes Fabric DB to apps and agents.

products.name: Studio (Surrealist)
products.description: Explore data, design schema, and run queries in a visual studio.
products.connects: The console over Fabric DB.
